name: Alpine Mushroom Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Porcini mushrooms; cut into 1-inch pieces
1 cup Tomatoes; peeled, seeded, and diced
recipeInstructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit. Place the mushrooms, garlic, and olive oil on a sheet pan. Toss until evenly coated. Season with salt and pepper if desired. Bake in the preheated oven for about 20 minutes or until the mushrooms are lightly browned and tender. Remove from the oven and toss with the remaining ingredients. Keep at room temperature.
